problem_statement: Recreate Azure Search data source/index/indexer notebook flow while keeping Search and Blob private-only from initial deployment.
hypothesis: AAD-authenticated P2S VPN plus private DNS forwarding enables end-to-end private Search indexing from local notebooks without keys.
customer_scenario: Engineers validating fully private Azure AI Search ingestion against Blob storage with managed identity only.
data_requirements: NASA earth book PDFs from Azure-Samples/azure-search-sample-data.
security_notes: Search disableLocalAuth=true, Storage allowSharedKeyAccess=false, both publicNetworkAccess disabled, AAD/MI only.
